title: Spicy Light Canadian Green Pepper Stir-fry
description: A halal-friendly midnight-craving dish featuring spicy green peppers in a light sauce, perfect for quick and easy meals.
instructions: Heat oil in a pressure cooker over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and chili flakes, stirring for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Add green peppers and cook until slightly softened, about 2 minutes.
Pour in soy sauce and water. Stir well to combine all ingredients thoroughly.
Lock the lid on and set the pressure cooker to high pressure according to manufacturer's instructions (usually around 15-18 minutes).
Once cooking is done, allow the steam to release naturally for at least 5 minutes before safely releasing any remaining pressure.
